2019November 3, 2019

🇺🇸 Marina del Rey, CA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Marina del Rey, United States, November 3, 2019 -- November 8, 2019

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2019-11-marina-del-rey-usa

25 Resolutions

1036Plenary
Apply 8-week CD ballot duration to ISO 10303-59 ed3
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to make the CD ballot duration of ISO 10303-59 ed3 to eight weeks.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1035Plenary
Call for requirements on data visualization for industrial artefacts
SC 4 calls SC 4 WG conveners and liaison organizations to deliver to JWG 16, their use cases, examples, and requirements about data visualization in the context of industrial artefacts before end J...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1034Plenary
Create Ad hoc team for Nuclear Digital Ecosystem Specification
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager launch an Ad hoc team with following participants: * Christophe Mouton, EDF, France * Yves Keraron, Isadeus, France * Hiroshi Seki, Hitachi, Japan * Yoshiaki Son...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1033Plenary
Appoint Mario Tucci as SC 4 Implementation Forum Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Mario Tucci as Deputy Convenor of SC 4/AG 02 "Implementation Forum" for a three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1032Plenary
Appoint Yoshiaki Sonoda as Liaison Officer to IEC SC 3D
SC 4 nominates Yoshiaki Sonoda to serve as liaison officer to IEC SC 3D for a three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1031Plenary
Circulate CIB for draft ISO Committee Specific Procedure
SC 4 requests the Committee Manager to circulate a Committee Internal Ballot with a draft of the ISO Committee Specific Procedure (CSP) for comment and invite relevant ISO committees to join in lia...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1030Plenary
Document mapping between ISO 10303 STEP and ISO 23952 QIF
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager launch a PWI/TR to develop a Technical Report formally documenting the correspondence between the entities in ISO 10303 and ISO 23952 using a mapping language. T...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1029Plenary
Identify experts to review ISO/DIS 29002 Edition 2
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to ask member National Bodies and SC 4 Working Group Convenors to identify experts to contact Peter Eales, project leader of ISO 29002 Edition 2, and Tim King, C...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1028Plenary
Prepare report to combine ISO 8000 master data standards
SC 4 requests WG 13 to prepare a technical report outlining the steps necessary to combine existing (and any future) standards in the ISO 8000 series of parts relating to master data and names Pete...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1027Plenary
Cancel ISO 8000-64 and launch NP Ballot
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to cancel ISO 8000-64 and, after receiving the appropriate documentation from WG 13, launch an NP Ballot of ISO 8000-64 with the document attached to the ISO For...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1026Plenary
Establish PWI for Ontology for geometry and topology
SC 4 establishes a PWI to create a Technical Report on Ontology for geometry and topology. The report is to be delivered in May 2020 for review at the next SC 4 meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1025Plenary
Create Task Force for ISO 10303 SMRL Architecture innovation
SC 4 creates a Task Force titled "ISO 10303 SMRL Architecture innovation" with the following term of reference: 1. Taking into account the workshop report out and phasing plan proposal, develop a d...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1024Plenary
Extend term of AHG 1 Core Industrial Data Set of Terms
SC 4 extends the term for AHG 1 to the next meeting where a final report will be provided.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1023Plenary
Apply 24-month development track to ISO 15926-14
Upon reviewing the work plan of ISO 15926-14, SC 4 recognizes the progress made to date and requests its Committee Manager apply the 24-month development track to the ISO 15926-14 project in order ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1022Plenary
Appoint David Leal as Liaison Officer to NAFEMS
SC 4 appoints David Leal for a three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1021Plenary
Reappoint Jochen Haenisch as WG 12 and WG 21 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convenor for the WG 12 "STEP Modeling Product and Resources" and WG 21 "SMRL validation team" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1020Plenary
Appoint Melissa Harvey as Quality Committee Secretary
SC 4 appoints Melissa Harvey as the Secretary of the Quality Committee for a three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1019Plenary
Appoint Véronique Dubillot as Quality Committee Convenor
SC 4 appoints Véronique Dubillot as the Convenor for the Quality Committee for a three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
